verdict_history.phase: Phase 6 dogfood C — initial Visual Oracle
verdict_history.notes: whileInView on body sections → sections invisible in fullPage screenshot. Visual Oracle correctly flagged '3500px black void' — the tool caught a real rendering bug caused by framer-motion + Playwright interaction. Visual raw score 65, REJECT. Dogfood finding #4.

After whileInView → animate fix across 5 files. Visual 76 reported, 73 computed (drift -3). Code Lane perfect 100 (0 err, 0 warn, 86 arbitrary-hex info). Mechanical 65/76 specs. Composite 86 passes MVP threshold (≥80). Remaining major critiques: five-phases 4-equal cards (AI feature grid feel), install CTA too small with dead space. Minor: hero meta column disconnection, pillars parallelism, fix-loop hierarchy. Acceptable for first shipment — opens refinement vectors for next iteration.

verdict_history_v3.notes: Full editorial redesign from mono-dark-tech brutal to cream+Fraunces+Friedrich. All shadows removed, 6 section dividers removed per user feedback.
Five-movements redesigned as vertical zig-zag stagger per Visual Oracle suggestion. User explicitly rejected ('이전 layout이 더 좋음') — reverted in v3.2.

verdict_history_v3.phase: v3.2 user-preferred horizontal flat (reverted to scroll strip)
verdict_history_v3.notes: Five-movements back to horizontal scroll with column-rule cards. Hero badge removed, install command added as small mono line, install→footer gap closed per user request.

verdict_history_v3.phase: v3.3 nav dark tint + install fade-to-footer + numerals calm
verdict_history_v3.notes: Nav changed to warm brown glass over hero painting, install Constable band fades to footer-black at bottom while CTA card retains breathing room, five-movements Roman numerals collapsed from 52-64px display to small mono eyebrow. First 93 score.

verdict_history_v3.phase: v3.4 final (full-width nav, card width fix, padding refinements)
verdict_history_v3.notes: Nav full-width edge-to-edge with 15% white translucent bg (removed black tint + text-shadow per user feedback), five-movements cards narrowed to 240-248px + centered with justify-center max-w wrapper, install CTA padding restructured so card floats above fade zone, hero install command size bumped to 13-15px. Oracle not re-invoked after these micro-tweaks — trade-off accepted (token budget vs marginal score delta).

verdict.notes: First shipped entry to reach full APPROVE (v3.3 measured 93/100). v3.4 micro-tweaks post-measurement estimated to hold or slightly improve. Editorial-romantic cluster exemplar.
